clips.spawn: Short battlefield unit spawn and weapon unsheathe stinger. Light steel draw, cloth and leather settle, no voices, no music.
clips.hurt: Short human battlefield hurt reaction. Nonverbal armored grunt with light armor movement, no gore, no voices, no music.
clips.death: Short medieval human combat death collapse. Armor, cloth, and body drop, nonverbal, no gore, no music.

clips.attack: Short light one-handed melee slash with quick steel whoosh and light hit. Militia or swordsman energy, no voices, no music.
Short heavy armored melee swing and cleave. Knight, shield guard, paladin, or king style. Weighty steel, solid impact, no voices, no music.
clips.defend: Short shield block and brace. Heavy shield catch with armored strain, no voices, no music.

clips.attack: Short spear or halberd thrust and sweep with piercing contact. Polearm battlefield foley, no voices, no music.
Short bow release with brief arrow whoosh. Clean medieval archer shot, no voices, no music.
clips.impact: Short arrow impact into armor or wood. Sharp medieval projectile thunk, no voices, no music.

clips.attack: Short crossbow fire with bolt snap and brief whoosh. Heavy mechanical twang, no voices, no music.
clips.impact: Short heavy bolt impact. Punchier and harder than an arrow hit, no voices, no music.

clips.attack: Short arcane cast and orb launch. Focused magical crackle with battlefield clarity, no voices, no music.
clips.impact: Short arcane orb impact. Tight magical burst with shimmering energy, no voices, no music.

clips.attack: Short holy heal cast with a brief apply shimmer. Sacred battlefield support magic, no voices, no choir, no music.
